Build Strength & Muscle Effectively

Top Muscle Training Exercises

Push-Ups

Classic chest and arm workout, targets your chest, shoulders, and triceps.

Squats

Essential leg exercise that strengthens quads, glutes, and core stability.

Deadlifts

Powerful full-body lift focusing on back, legs, and grip strength.

Plank

Core strengthening exercise improving posture and abdominal endurance.
